Example Sample Metadata

Source: R/data.R
sampledata.Rd

Example phenotype and covariate data used by easyEWAS.

Usage

sampledata

Format

A data frame with 100 rows and 5 variables:

  • SampleName:

    Sample identifier.

  • var:

    Example exposure variable.

  • cov1:

    Example covariate 1.

  • cov2:

    Example covariate 2.

  • batch:

    Example batch variable.

Source

Simulated example data bundled with the package.

On this page

Developed by Yuting Wang, Xu Gao.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
